description: A temporary calibration target for validating the calibration pipeline. Replace these targets with digitized literature or lab measurements before making biological claims.
notes: Model days are not yet mapped to real time.
Pheromone values are model units, not chemical concentration.
Targets encode desired qualitative behavior: discover food, recruit foragers, then lose trail after resource removal.

first_food_day.meaning: First simulated day when at least one food trip is completed.

food_trips_before_removal.meaning: Completed food trips before food source is removed.

trail_decay_fraction_after_1d.meaning: Food pheromone one day after food removal divided by peak food pheromone.

food_task_count_before_removal.meaning: Number of ants assigned to food task before food removal.

brood_total_after_3d.meaning: Brood should remain viable during the short foraging calibration.

avg_energy_after_3d.meaning: Short calibration should not create unrealistic worker exhaustion.
